title: juncus balticus f. tenuis
intro: Juncus balticus f. tenuis, also known as narrow-stemmed alder-mist grass or narrow-stemmed rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Juncus balticus f. tenuis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically harvested, dried, and used as a tea, tincture, or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
